subject: Typical parameters to refine for M
body:
Hi everyone,

I am new to Warp and M and want to hear some experience here.

My map go to 8.2A with Relion 5 (Pixel size 2.12). I used the guideline 
refinement and get to 7.3 Angstrom resolution. When I looked in the 
population file, I saw quite a lot of option. Clearly the map is not high 
res enough to do some of the options there. Anyone has a good strategy to 
refinement options at my resolution?

<LastRefinementOptions>

<Param Name="NIterations" Value="3" />

<Param Name="DoDefocusGridSearch" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoZernike4" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoZernike2" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoDoming" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoCs" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoPhaseShift" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoAstigmatismAngle" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoAstigmatismDelta" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoDefocus" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoTiltMovies" Value="False" />

<Param Name="GeometryHighPass" Value="20" />

<Param Name="DoZernike5" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoZernike13" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoMagnification" Value="False" />

<Param Name="DoParticlePoses" Value="True" />

<Param Name="DoAxisAngles" Value="False" />

<Param Name="VolumeWarpLength" Value="10" />

<Param Name="VolumeWarpDepth" Value="2" />

<Param Name="VolumeWarpHeight" Value="3" />

<Param Name="VolumeWarpWidth" Value="3" />

<Param Name="DoVolumeWarp" Value="False" />

<Param Name="ImageWarpHeight" Value="3" />

<Param Name="ImageWarpWidth" Value="3" />

<Param Name="DoImageWarp" Value="True" />

<Param Name="UseHostMemory" Value="True" />

<Param Name="MinParticlesPerItem" Value="10" />

<Param Name="InitialResolutionPercent" Value="80" />

<Param Name="BatchSize" Value="16" />

<Param Name="BFactorWeightingThreshold" Value="0.25" />

<Param Name="MinimumCTFRefinementResolution" Value="7" />

<Param Name="CTFHighPass" Value="20" />

</LastRefinementOptions>


Best,

Huy
